items.name: Footprints
items.description: See the Murderer's trail on the floor for 5 seconds.

items.name: Tracker
items.description: An arrow briefly points toward the Murderer.

items.name: Aura Scan
items.description: All players flash their role color for 2 seconds.

items.name: Shadow Blade
items.description: Murderer only: instant kill from any distance, one use.

items.name: Noise Trap
items.description: Place a trap at your position. If the Murderer walks over it, their screen shakes for 3 seconds.

items.name: Alarm
items.description: The Murderer's screen shakes when they get within 100px of you for the next 30 seconds.

items.name: Ghost Mode
items.description: Become semi-transparent and untargetable by the Murderer for 10 seconds.

items.name: Dead Eye
items.description: Your next bullet auto-aims at the Murderer if they are within 300 pixels.
